message:
fix(sync): tighten RwLockWriteGuard Sync bound to require T: Send + Sync

RwLockWriteGuard provides &mut T via DerefMut, so sharing the guard
across threads (Sync) requires T: Send + Sync — matching the standard
library's RwLockWriteGuard. The previous bound of just T: Sync was
unsound because it would allow sending a &mut T to another thread
when T is Sync but not Send.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
